title: narcissus calcicola subsp. cuatrecasasii
intro: Narcissus calcicola subsp. cuatrecasasii is a rare, flowering plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its alkaloid content, which has been studied for its potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Narcissus calcicola subsp. cuatrecasasii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of infections, wounds, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant's herbal preparations, although not widely documented, are typically made from its bulbs or flowers and may be used to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
